prerequisites: An Orb account. Per Airbyte's connector docs, you can request an Orb account and API key by contacting the Orb team at team@withorb.com.
An Orb API key, used as a Bearer token to authenticate API requests.
A start_date value (required), defining the earliest date from which the connector syncs data.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the single secret field api_key. Per Airbyte's Orb source docs, the connector uses Bearer token authentication, sending the key in the Authorization header on requests to the Orb API (base URL https://api.withorb.com/v1).

setupSteps.title: Obtain an Orb API key
setupSteps.body: Obtain an Orb account and API key. Per Airbyte's Orb source docs, if you do not yet have an account or key, contact the Orb team at team@withorb.com.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Enter the key in the required api_key field. This is the only secret field and grants the connector access to your Orb data over the Orb REST API.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync window
setupSteps.body: Set start_date (required) to the earliest date to sync data from. Optionally set end_date to cap the sync window and lookback_window_days to re-fetch recently changed records.

setupSteps.title: Configure optional scoping fields
setupSteps.body: Optionally set plan_id to focus on a specific billing plan, subscription_usage_grouping_key to group subscription usage data, and string_event_properties_keys and numeric_event_properties_keys to include specific custom event properties in synced records.

sources.title: Orb API reference (base URL, list plans endpoint)
